checklistItemsEvaluated: Clickable draft-mode navigation exists for the requested sections.
Post packages expand and expose hook, caption, CTA, platform, pillar, proof note, risk note, owner_approved_draft status, and live-posting block.
Calendar supports day selection and platform/content-pillar filters while preserving 3-post-per-day source data.
Approval queue separates approved draft posts, approved weekly report, and remaining pending client-management approvals.
Weekly report supports local copy and static download only.
Blocked live actions panel explains why OAuth, credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics, n8n, and live social actions are blocked.
Settings show handles not_provided, accounts not_connected, credentialsStored false, and draft_only mode.
No backend, external API call, tracking script, credential, social connector, n8n activation, or paid service was added.
improvementRecommendations: Add lightweight browser interaction tests later if the target repo adopts Playwright or another test runner.
Keep any future persistent source-of-truth updates inside AG OS PRs rather than browser state.
Keep OAuth, scheduling, posting, analytics, DMs/comments, and n8n activation separate and approval gated.
limitations: Candidate product score only. It does not authorize OAuth, account connection, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, DMs/comments, n8n activation, credentials, paid services, production deployment, domain/DNS, accepted lessons, or permanent memory.
Playwright was unavailable in the target repo, so browser automation was not run.
No live social platform account was used.
notes: Target PR #7 was clean for the approved draft/staging interaction milestone and was merged under owner approval.
